description_long: This object is a classic, ornately decorated shotgun featuring a long, slender black barrel and a polished wooden stock with a rich, reddish-brown hue. The receiver and adjacent areas are adorned with intricate gold-toned engravings, adding a touch of elegance and historical flair. The grip is smoothly contoured for ergonomic handling, and the trigger guard is rounded and metallic, providing protection for the trigger. The hammer is visibly exposed, suggesting a traditional firing mechanism. The overall design is reminiscent of 19th-century hunting or dueling firearms, blending functionality with decorative craftsmanship.
description: An ornately engraved, long-barreled shotgun with a polished wooden stock and gold-toned metal accents, featuring a classic, elegant design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the engraved receiver, wooden stock, and exposed hammer.
description_view_1: Front-on view down the barrel, emphasizing the circular muzzle and symmetrical alignment of the stock and barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the first but with subtle differences in wood grain and metal detailing visible.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the butt of the stock and the top of the receiver, showing the curvature and ergonomic shaping of the grip.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long and slender with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized metallic guard with a smooth contour and no finger grooves
